# USNow — It's Not AI. It's Organized Intelligence.
> usnow.app | The Interactive World Compendium
> The Question is the Answer. Start Anywhere. Go Anywhere.
> © Jonathan Tatun, 2026. All rights reserved.

USNow is a worldwide civic and cultural knowledge platform — an interactive map of everything that touches human life, organized from the inside out. It covers 1,297 topics across 7 layers: ME MYSELF & I, ORIGINS, COMMUNITY & CULTURE, KNOWLEDGE & LEARNING, POWER & POLITICS, HISTORY & CIVILIZATION, and EVEN FURTHER BACK.

Topics include: democracy, capitalism, race, family, consciousness, war, religion, technology, climate change, inequality, mythology, death, media manipulation, labor rights, military empire, surveillance, the attention economy, grief, attachment theory, student debt, nuclear weapons, the revolving door, ancestral memory, and 1,280 more.

The site is built for exploration, not consumption. Topics are connected through a web of cross-links, related concepts, and curated offsite sources. The voice is plain, factual, and unflinching — never academic, never preachy. Assumes an intelligent adult reader.

## Full Content Index
The complete structured text of all 1,297 topic descriptions — organized by layer, orb, and branch — is available at:
https://usnow.app/llms-full.txt

## Built-in Glossary
The World Compendium defines key civic and cultural terms used across the site — with phonetics, etymology, history, and cross-references throughout.

## Author
Jonathan Tatun | atjon.substack.com | usnow.app
Target launch: July 4, 2026 — 250th Anniversary of the Declaration of Independence.
